welcomeSubtitle: Thailand's plant marketplace. Here's a quick tour to get you growing.

browse.title: Browse plants
browse.description: Explore thousands of plants by species, size, price, and location. Filter to find exactly what you want.

buy.title: Buy with confidence
buy.description: Make offers, message sellers, and pay securely. Every purchase is protected by our escrow system.

sell.title: Sell your plants
sell.description: List your plants in minutes. Manage inventory, orders, and payouts from your seller dashboard.

qr.title: QR provenance
qr.description: Scan a plant's QR code to see its full history — previous owners, care notes, and verified transfers.

savedPlaces.title: Saved places
savedPlaces.description: Save pickup and delivery locations so checkout is faster and sellers know where to meet.

marketData.title: Market data
marketData.description: Track price trends, compare species, and set alerts so you never miss a deal.
